# PHIL.091 ? Philosophy of Science

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** specialized_interdisciplinary
**Subcategory:** philosophy_of_science
**Domain:** SPECIALIZED_INTERDISCIPLINARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Nature of scientific knowledge; demarcation problem; theory confirmation; paradigms; scientific realism vs anti-realism

## Application
Examine scientific method; theory evaluation; demarcate science from non-science; paradigm analysis; realism questions

## Key Values
- Scientific method
- Theory evaluation
- Demarcation
- Epistemology of science
